--- Page 2 ---
About Us
Founded in August 2016, Evelabs is a MedTech company with the mission to enhance clinical efficiency, safety,
and patient experience through innovative IoT-connected medical devices . Certified under ISO 13485, the
company handles all aspects of medical device lifecycle management—from R&D and design to
manufacturing, distribution, and servicing.
Where We Operate
•Headquarters & Manufacturing: Located at the Kerala Technology Innovation Zone in Maker Village,
Kalamassery near Kochi, Kerala .
•Service Reach: Products installed at over 200+ healthcare institutions across India, covering more than
90 customers and over 15000 units in hospitals, clinics, and government facilities covering all states in
India.
Partnerships & Recognition
Evelabs has been supported by notable funders and incubators such as JITO Angel Network, IKP Hyderabad,
BIRAC, Kerala Startup Mission, IIM‑Ahmedabad’s CIIE, and ISB’s D‑labs .
Awards & recognitions include:
•Medicall Innovation Awards (2018: Best Emerging Startup)
•CAHO Innovation Awards
•NASSCOM HIC Healthcare Innovation Awards
•CII Design Excellence Awards
•Selected for Arab Health Innov8 Talks 2021 (one of 30 global startups)
•Participation in UNDP Draper University Acceleration 2021
--- Page 3 ---
� Our Service & How We Deliver It
At Evelabs, we ensure that every installation is smooth, every staff member is confident, and every support call is
answered. Our service is designed to be simple, fast, and reliable.
� 1. Pre‑Installation Planning
Site Readiness Guidance
We coordinate with the hospital's electrical, mechanical, and IT teams to ensure readiness. Evelabs provides detailed
installation guidelines to help the hospital prepare for a faultless deployment.
⚙ 2. Onsite Configuration & Setup
Configuration & Testing
Our team maps each button to the respective bed or location based on your layout and requirements. Once configured
and tested, the system is live and ready to use — no further setup needed.
� � 3. Training & Handover
Onsite Staff Training
We provide hands-on training to nursing staff and technical teams on how to use the system, respond to alerts, and
manage common troubleshooting.
Documentation & Sign-off
All installations are formally documented with checklists and training records to ensure completeness and compliance.
� 4. After‑Sales Support
Dedicated Support with Escalation Matrix
Hospitals receive prompt assistance via phone or email, with a guaranteed response time of under 1 hour for
support calls.
Instant Button Replacement Support
In most cases, button replacement can be completed over a phone call. We ensure hospital maintenance teams are
trained to perform basic replacements and diagnostics.
We offer Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) that include preventive checks, software upgrades, and
performance optimization.
--- Page 4 ---
Customers
The solution has been successfully implemented with over 200+ customers, ranging from small clinics to large hospitals,
including INHS Sanjeevani, Baby Memorial, Nanavati Max, and Fortis. In total, 15000 units have been deployed.

Terms & Conditions
Scope of Application
The General Terms and Conditions (“General Terms”) hereinafter set forth shall exclusively apply to all transactions with Evelabs technologies
Private Limited (“Evelabs”) with registered office in V V Nivas Archal Nediyara PO Anchal Kollam Kerala India 691306
.
Configuration & Installation Terms
1.Configuration & Training
The configuration and training of Evelabs products will be carried out exclusively by the Evelabs team.
1.Site Preparation
All wiring, drilling, and related preparatory work must be completed by the customers' team, as per Evelabs’ installation requirements.
1.Pre-Installation Requirements
Any civil, electrical, mechanical, or IT-related work necessary for the installation of Evelabs products must be fully completed before the
installation process begins.
1.Installation & Handover
A proper, fault-free installation followed by a professional handover to hospital staff is mandatory. This process must be documented and
acknowledged in writing by both parties.
Other Payment Terms
All bank charges of Dealer Bank shall be borne by the buyer and seller Bank charges will be borne by the seller.
Delivery Period
Period of Delivery is 25 days from the confirmation of order by Evelabs unless specified by Evelabs over email communication. The period for
delivery and performance starts upon dispatch of the acknowledgement and acceptance of the order by Evelabs, but not before, if necessary, all
technical details have been fully cleared up and agreed upon, all documentation, permits, approvals, clearances etc. to be supplied by the buyer
have been provided, and only after any agreed upon down payment has been received by Evelabs. Compliance with the delivery period or
schedule shall be contingent upon performance of the buyer’s obligations.
Maintenance
Scope The scope of work covers comprehensive on-site maintenance of Devices provided by Evelabs and doesn’t involve any other infrastructure
required for installation.
--- Page 7 ---
All the complaints received shall be attended by them in the following manner.
- Minor faults immediately with telephonic support.
- Major faults which require a visit to the branch within a week.
- Repair of equipment shall be carried out at Evelabs Production Site and shall be sent back to the customer.
Any terms described here will not be valid if a seperate contract is signed between buyer and Evelabs.
Duties of Inspection and Notice of Defects
The buyer shall be obliged to inspect the packaging and the products immediately upon delivery and loses the right to rely on a lack of conformity
of the products if the buyer does not give notice to Evelabs specifying the nature of the lack of conformity within 5 days.
Warranty of Quality of Evelabs Products
Evelabs will provide warranty of the product for the period of 12 months, unless specified in separate warranty card.
The start of the warranty period depends on the return of the duly completed and signed Evelabs Installation Protocol. The nonreturn of the two
protocols within 6 weeks after installation and hand-over invalidates the warranty.
Generally excluded from the warranty period are all wear & tear parts pull cord, pedant button and battery.
Evelabs shall not be liable for any damage resulting from non-compliance with the instructions for assembly and/or installation and/or the
operating instructions, from unsuitable or improper storage and/or use of the Evelabs products, from faulty assembly and/or installation or from
faulty commissioning by the buyer or third parties, from normal wear and tear, or from faulty or negligent handling by the buyer, nor for any
damage caused by unsuitable components or parts or replacement materials, chemical, electrochemical, electrical, atmospheric and other
unforeseeable influences, provided that any such damage is not predominantly attributable to any fault on the side of Evelabs.
Place of Performance, Place of Jurisdiction, and Governing Law
Exclusive Place of jurisdiction for any dispute arising under, out of, in connection with or relating to this Agreement shall be Cochin India, governed
by the law of India.

--- Page 1 ---
Alamo Nurse Call Components
Bed Unit
Call Point / Transmitter with Bedside Button
Patient call point with Call, Cancel, Acknowledge and Housekeeping
buttons. This module also has 2 RJ11 ports to connect accessories and a
power port to connect an adapter if needed.
Patient side call switch accessories that can be connected to the main call
point. The switch is connected to the call point via coil cord and can be
placed near bed. It makes it easier for patients to make nurse calls.
Bathroom Unit
Call Point / Transmitter with Pull Cord
This module also has 2 RJ11 ports to connect accessories and a power port to
connect an adapter if needed. As the transmitter is separate it reduces the
risk of getting pulled off by users.Pull Cord accessory that can be connected
to a call point for use in washrooms for ease of access.
Room Indicator
Room Light
Indicator lights to be placed outside the room doors. These lights can be paired with call
points so that they light up when a call is made.

Alamo Manager

maintenance reports.

Terms and Conditions
Scope of Application
The General Terms and Conditions (“General Terms”) hereinafter set forth shall exclusively apply to all transactions with
Evelabs technologies Private Limited (“Evelabs”) with registered office in V V Nivas Archal Nediyara PO Anchal Kollam Kerala
India 691306
Buyer’s General Terms and Conditions
Any differing or conflicting general terms of the buyer shall not be applicable to any transaction and are hereby rejected.
Consequently, any variations from these General Terms shall be of no effect unless they have been agreed to in writing by
Evelabs
.
Payment Terms
50 percent advance and 50 percent post-delivery of items purchased.
All bank charges of Dealer Bank shall be borne by the buyer and seller Bank charges will be borne by the seller.
Delivery Period
Period of Delivery is 25 days from the confirmation of order by Evelabs. The period for delivery and performance starts upon
dispatch of the acknowledgement and acceptance of the order by Evelabs, but not before, if necessary, all technical details
have been fully cleared up and agreed upon, all documentation, permits, approvals, clearances etc. to be supplied by the
--- Page 11 ---
buyer have been provided, and only after any agreed upon down payment has been received by Evelabs. Compliance with
the delivery period or schedule shall be contingent upon performance of the buyer’s obligations.
Maintenance
Scope The scope of work covers comprehensive on-site maintenance of Devices provided by Evelabs and doesn’t involve
any other infrastructure required for installation.
All the complaints received shall be attended by them in the following manner.
- Minor faults immediately with telephonic support.
- Major faults which require a visit to the branch within a week.
- Repair of equipment shall be carried out at Evelabs Production Site and shall be sent back to the customer.
Any terms described here will not be valid if a seperate contract is signed between buyer and Evelabs.
Duties of Inspection and Notice of Defects
The buyer shall be obliged to inspect the packaging and the products immediately upon delivery and loses the right to rely
on a lack of conformity of the products if the buyer does not give notice to Evelabs specifying the nature of the lack of
conformity within 5 days.
Installation
Any work related to requirements on the installation of evelabs products electrical, mechanical IT shall be completed prior
to the start of installation process. The faultless installation and professional hand-over of the products to the hospital staff
has to be documented in writing.
Warranty of Quality of Evelabs Products
Evelabs will provide warranty of the product for the period of 12 months.
The start of the warranty period depends on the return of the duly completed and signed Evelabs Installation Protocol. The
nonreturn of the two protocols within 6 weeks after installation and hand-over invalidates the warranty.
Generally excluded from the warranty period are all wear & tear parts pull cord, pedant button and battery.
